title: ConvertKit vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and Privy comes down to your specific use case. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Privy?
faq.a: ConvertKit starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
